Let's Talk!
Granular Marketing Programs

Market Research & Audience Insights

Market research, audience segmentation, benchmarking, and persona development that keep your strategy grounded in real EdTech insight.

Book a strategy session

Audience layering only works if the underlying data is right. Before any campaign launches, we build and enrich the audience it's targeting — then keep validating that targeting throughout the engagement rather than setting it once and hoping it holds.

What this looks like

Audience Segmentation & Contact List

A curated, enriched list of target contacts built from Ideal Customer Profile criteria — institution type, role, geography, company size, technology stack. Built with Clay, Apollo, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator, segmented in HubSpot.

Initial Strategy Workshop

A structured kickoff session used to validate the Ideal Customer Profile and personas against real account data — not assumptions — before campaign planning starts.

Competitive & Benchmarking Analysis

Research into how target accounts and competitors are positioned, messaged, and performing — used to sharpen differentiation and find where a campaign can win attention competitors aren't contesting.

Persona Development

Structured definitions of the buyer roles a campaign needs to reach — built from CRM data, stakeholder interviews, and platform-level audience reporting.

Ongoing Audience Validation

Recurring review of who is actually engaging — by company, job title, seniority, and geography — used to confirm the Ideal Customer Profile is being reached, or correct course when targeting drifts.

Part of Granular Marketing Programs

Ground every campaign in who's actually buying.

Book a strategy session
